Id of the deployment and the new prompt to run. The /agents/deployments/prompt API accepts requests in the following format:

UpdateAgentDeploymentRequest Model - Request body for sending a follow-up prompt to an agent deployment.
deploymentId string
required
example: A-99bd84b60376ecda56c1145b2074ca32
Identifier of the running deployment to send the follow-up prompt to.
prompt string
required
example: Test with ROC(30)
New prompt for the deployment to run.
Example 
{
  "deploymentId": "A-99bd84b60376ecda56c1145b2074ca32",
  "prompt": "Test with ROC(30)"
}
